title: Expecting all properties to be returned when creating a MODEL CAR BRAND
gherkin:
When the user creates a "MODEL CAR BRAND" "Hot Wheels" with the following data
  | key | value | datatype |
  | name | Hot Wheele | string |
  | founded | 1968 | number |
  | defunct |  | number |
Then the response should contain the following properties
  | key | value | datatype |
  | name | Hot Wheele | string |
  | founded | 1968 | number |
  | defunct |  | number |
